arts.ttl: Lazio Attacker Risks Three-Match Ban for Violent Conduct
arts.sum: Lazio forward Tijjani Noslin could reportedly be slapped with a three-match ban in the Europa League following his dismissal against Dynamo Kyiv. The Dutchman’s maiden appearance for the club on the European stage was utterly disastrous. arts.ttl: Lazio vs Nice | Europa League | Team News & Probable Lineups
arts.sum: Lazio will be gunning for their second Europa League victory in as many outings when they host Nice in Rome. The clash takes place at the Stadio Olimpico and kicks off on Thursday at 18:45 CET. Lazio Team News, Injuries, Suspensions & Probable Lineup For the second week in a row, Marco Baroni will drop several key […] The post Lazio vs Nice | Europa League | Team News & Probable Lineups appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Europa League | Lazio v Nice: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Lazio are set for their home debut in this season’s Europa League as they prepare to face Ligue 1 side Nice on Thursday afternoon. After an impressive 3-0 away victory against Dynamo Kyiv in Hamburg, the Biancocelesti aim to maintain their position atop the group standings while continuing their strong form from Serie A. Baroni is expected to make several changes to the lineup that defeated Torino in their recent Serie A match. In goal, Mandas is likely to start, although there’s still a possibility that Provedel could retain his place. The defense is set to feature Marusic and Pellegrini The post Europa League | Lazio v Nice: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.
